Description.DefaultValue: Speak Logic Information Analysis Add-in for Outlook

bt:String.DefaultValue: Flag selected text for later analysis
Flag current paragraph for later analysis
Apply analysis as feedback to selection
Apply analysis as feedback to paragraph
Apply this received email as feedback (auto-extracts the Speak Logic template)
Send paragraph analysis as email feedback
View counts of analyses, feedback and identified items
View all selections related to a principle
Configure your name and email for analysis and feedback
Manage flagged words per person and warn or block sending
View a log of flagged words found when sending email
Manage your contacts for feedback and analysis
Send feedback to the Speak Logic team
Access help, about, and configuration options
Open the Speak Logic sidebar panel

Flag current paragraph for later analysis
Apply analysis as feedback to selection
Apply analysis as feedback to paragraph
Apply this received email as feedback (auto-extracts the Speak Logic template)
Send paragraph analysis as email feedback
View counts of analyses, feedback and identified items

Configure your name and email for analysis and feedback
Manage flagged words per person and warn or block sending

Manage your contacts for feedback and analysis

Access help, about, and configuration options
Open the Speak Logic sidebar panel
